page: Microsoft Azure M128-64bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 64 vCPUs mapped to 32 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8473C processor with an x86_64 architecture, operating at a clock speed of 4.0 GHz. The processor includes a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX_TILE and AMX_INT8). The instance is equipped with 1024.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per core. Local storage consists of a 410 GB disk, and the instance is Premium Storage capable. No GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses are included.

In benchmark evaluations, the M128-64bds_v3 demonstrates strong multi-core performance and top-tier memory bandwidth capabilities. Its memory bandwidth for large block read-only and write operations ranks in the top 10% of tested servers, reaching 366.27 GB/sec and 168.19 GB/sec respectively. Geekbench single-core, image processing, and text processing scores also place in the top 10%. Multi-threaded workloads, such as bzip3 decompression and software compilation, show strong performance in the top 25%. Database operations on Passmark register in the top 10%, while Redis SET operations achieve a strong rating at 87.07 million operations per second. For machine learning workloads, the server delivers strong prompt processing speeds across small, medium, and large models, though text generation speeds for large 70B models fall into the average tier.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the M128-64bds_v3 offers high resource density, making it suitable for memory-intensive enterprise workloads without the added cost of GPU hardware. The combination of high-capacity RAM, fast memory bandwidth, and strong multi-core processing makes this instance well-suited for large-scale relational databases, in-memory caching systems like Redis, data analytics, and memory-bound scientific simulations.
description: Microsoft Azure M128-64bds_v3 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the MBDSMediumMemoryv3 family, powered by an Intel Xeon 8473C processor with 64 vCPUs and 32 physical cores running at 4.0 GHz. It features 1024.0 GB of RAM, a 410 GB local storage disk, and is Premium Storage capable. Built on the x86_64 architecture and running under Microsoft Hyper-V, the server includes advanced CPU instructions like AVX-512 and Intel AMX. Benchmarks indicate top-tier performance in memory bandwidth, database operations, and text processing, alongside strong multi-core CPU capabilities. This high memory-to-core ratio and rapid memory throughput make the instance highly efficient for memory-intensive workloads, including large-scale databases, in-memory caches, and data analytics pipelines, without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware.
og_description: Microsoft Azure M128-64bds_v3 is a memory-optimized VM featuring 64 vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and a 410 GB local disk. It delivers top-tier memory bandwidth and database performance for enterprise workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring high-speed memory bandwidth, extensive RAM capacity, and advanced vector instructions for demanding database workloads.

1024.0 GB of RAM providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 16.0 GB per core.
